author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Fixed 47-error cascade in ferray-core under --all-features. Root cause was three layered issues: (1) no_std was an additive feature that broke when combined with std — inverted to use 'std' as positive gate across 6 files; (2) dimension/static_shape.rs had bitrotted (used std::fmt, format!, Vec, and Dimension methods only present in std mode) — gated on all(const_shapes, std); (3) static_shape.rs defined duplicate into_dyn methods on Array<T,Shape{1,2,3}> that shadowed the generic in array/methods.rs. Also moved 2 compile_fail doctests from empty carrier functions onto the actual StaticMatMul/StaticBroadcast traits they prove things about. Ran cargo fmt --all as cleanup. Verified: cargo check --workspace --all-features clean, clippy -D warnings clean, 637 ferray-core tests passing, no_std build still works via --no-default-features.
